item.title: Just a tuesday meme dump
item.description:
I’m gonna start doing this
Life goals, especially the bag that’s bigger on the inside
Just dreaming of summer and sundresses right now
Very comfortably
Never took a computer science class when I was in school but spend most days programming
Feeling stronger emotions and being able to cry easier has been liberating
:3
My internal monologue
That is all. I hope you have a terrific Tuesday ❤️
item.dc:creator: secretlyacd

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
a top notch meme format imo
that's metal af
damn ok
why do you think people like pizza so much? the delicious taste?
23 or 25 foot simply won't do
was on the phone with them for a half hour just to get service cancelled
practical
is that a turkey?
not really how i pictured it
as is tradition
wait what
much big
mmm hmm
ok
make me
this sucks bc i have a bunch of it (clown money)
that's my time.. have a great night, gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Papa is SO proud of his daughter Rosa, he tears up.
item.description:
Deservingly so. She can wipe her own Bum Bum!
Wholesome AF. A lovely friend. The look she gives him when he tears up.

item.description:
There’s a smut series called ‘Queen takes….‘ I think?? (looked it up, Jup book 4 is Queen Takes Rook, close enough I guess)
And, like, science
Apparently I don’t have said tags
“A witch ought never to be frightened in the darkest forest, Granny Weatherwax had once told her, because she should be sure in her soul that the most terrifying thing in the forest was her.”
Quitter
It doesn’t even matter

item.title: Amazing and absurd nature (and cat tax)
item.description:
(IMPORTANT EDIT: I failed in my fact-checking so the first pic is fake. I blame my head being full of snot. My sincerest apologies.) Posting a dump of nature pics because I need something positive right now. My son has the flu and won't come home for Yule, I have a cold and am too sick to do anything except doom scrolling on my phone. So enjoy these while I try to figure out how to tell my cat her favourite human won't be coming home this winter.
Visualisation of how my brain feels when I realise I said something rude.
Rearranging my clam shell collection and accidentally summoning a demon.
Older sibling: "The idiot is falling off the branch. Should we help?" Middle sibling "Nah" Being the youngest sucks.
One of my top favourite meme genres is 'big cat doing small cat stuff'.
Lost in the caapi.
Xenomorph egg
Fungus laughs at your stupid gender and sex binary.
I want to believe it sounds like Donald Duck's laugh.
He looks so smug, he knows exactly what he did.
That's right, don't let others label you, you beautiful little whatever you are.
I imagine this is what Jack Skellington's sperm looks like.
Jagpie
je suis un pingouin
Spaceballs
Me: "How big a wild boar is? Something like a big adult pig, right?" I was so wrong.
So wise and majestic....
Let's end this post on a classy note.
Bat butt
Cat tax Charlie: "Wake me up when the winter ends." Ms. Charlotta doesn't like winter or the fact that I'm sick. Every time I inhale for a sneeze, she bolts. What, like I can't be trusted just because I once sneezed all over her? ..... Ok, it has happened three times. But even so!
item.dc:creator: Kittensandyarns

item.title: Wait for it...
item.description: Fool just got anime'd.
item.dc:creator: NotSlybo

item.title: I Lost my 17 Year Old Orange Boy Today
item.description: Thomas was enjoying the summer warmth in this picture and chillin in the patio chair. He had kidney failure. I also lost my mother over three weeks ago from stage IV cancer, can't say it's a smooth holiday season for me. But both are not suffering anymore. Hug your loved ones and furry babies this season folks, show how much you care about them. I miss mine dearly right now but I am looking forward to catching up with some good company in the next few weeks as I wasn't able to do that this year with my mother being severely ill. Cheers Imgur, you guys have helped me and keep helping me get through some sad times with your non-sense humor, take care this Holiday season ❤️
item.dc:creator: Boppit92

item.title: Sissy SpaceX reportedly under federal review for undisclosed meetings with foreign leaders
item.description: Yeah I know, shocking right? Several employees allege that Musk and his company ducked and dodged reporting requirements to protect sensitive data since 2021. Elon Musk and SpaceX are under three federal reviews from three different US military departments for allegedly failing to comply with reporting protocols. The New York Times reported that Musk and his private aerospace company have repeatedly disregarded requirements to disclose trips and meetings with foreign leaders including Russian President Vladimir Putin. The three reviews of Musk and SpaceX’s suspected activity were opened by the Defense Department’s Office of Inspector General, the Air Force and the Pentagon’s Office of the Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and Security. The Air Force also reportedly denied Musk’s request for high-level security access because of concerns over potential security risks if he were allowed to handle certain pieces of classified information. https://www.yahoo.com/tech/article/elon-musk-spacex-reportedly-under-federal-review-for-undisclosed-meetings-with-foreign-leaders-213817035.html
item.dc:creator: PrinceMaxx7

item.title: The 492nd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
Most of those yesses and nos in the table don't seem right. EDIT: Judging off the pictures, names and descriptions, it seems like they should be as follows (changes marked *): BIG CHILL: All look ok BIG CRUNCH: No, No, Yes, *No, *No Big Crunch should lead to another Bang. BIG RIP: *Yes, Yes, *No, Yes, Yes It literally says "Infinite Expansion", which would last forever and decrease density. BIG SNAP: *Yes, *Yes, No, Maybe?, *Yes Fracturing into granules due to over-stretching should theoretically last forever, approach infinite size, and stretch infinitely right? DEATH BUBBLE: *Yes, *Yes, No, Maybe?, Yes Again, if it is due to stretching infinitely, it should last forever and approach infinite size.
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever I post or one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays This week I'm raising awareness for a Wild Life Hospital in England, the Lower Moss Wood Nature Reserve. They are in desperate need of funds to keep their doors open and keep educating the public. Here is a link to their Imgur Post about it, with a Go Fund Me link at the bottom. https://imgur.com/gallery/please-help-us-1097nGc They'll be closing at the end of January if they can't raise enough money.
Cucker Tarlson
Neato
A+
Rookie Numbers
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: The Donut
item.description:
Took my cat Seymour to the vet yesterday as he's been excessively grooming his belly lately to the point where he's licked off a good deal of the fur in that area. I assumed some sort of environmental irritation or allergy, but my vet felt around and instead discovered this lovely intruder. It's hard, about the size of a lemon, and by all accounts appears to be hollow. My vet has taken to referring to it as the "donut" because no matter which angle they x-ray, it still shows up as round with a dark spot in the middle, implying it to be spherical/ovoid and hollow. X-rays so far have proven inconclusive to determine exactly what we're dealing with. We're pretty sure it's a fast-growing tumor, at least. Vet thinks it could be related to the spleen or a lymph node. The next step is, unfortunately, exploratory surgery to find out exactly what's going on. Of course the holidays are looming so that's going to have to wait until January. On the plus side, he has shown no adverse symptoms aside from the excessive licking. He's still eating, sleeping, playing, pooping, and doing everything else a cat is supposed to do, and he doesn't even seem phased to be touched around the area either, so he doesn't seem to be causing him any pain, either. I'm very nervous for him and hope the news in January is good, or at least not bad.
External view for cat tax. As soft as he looks, let me assure you, he's even softer.
item.dc:creator: TheCarpe
